title: Camelliastrum caudatum
intro: Camelliastrum caudatum, also known as the Caudatum Camellia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, as well as potential cardiovascular and antimicrobial effects. The bioactive constituents of Camelliastrum caudatum include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are thought to contribute to its therapeutic properties. The most common herbal preparations made from this plant include teas, extracts, and infusions, which are often used to promote cardiovascular health and support immune function.
